images.prompt:
[SUBJECT] A split-frame allegorical diagram contrasting two models of perception: on the left, a severed window-pane drawn in rigid one-way projection with a lone arrow of light traveling unidirectionally into a disembodied eye, labeled by geometry as the passive-reception model; on the right, a closed probe-loop in which a silhouetted observer emits a ray of probing signal into a field, the signal strikes a small object and returns as a reciprocal arrow into the same observer, the emission and return drawn as a single continuous circuit so that sensor and emitter are one mechanism. A vertical diagrammatic spine divides the two halves.

Foreground Color: #CA8F31 industrial yellow main color in foreground

Background: Flat black #000000
